programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Back Country Trout Fishing
programme.desc: What a journey it's been over the last three weeks! We kicked off our adventure in Eastern Sears Creek, making our first casts to see what the waters would yield. From there, we headed to South Lake for some laid-back pontoon trout fishing. After a relaxing day by the lake, complete with apple pie and cold beverages, we followed expert advice from Jared to venture back into the heart of nature. Our trek led us to Long Lake, nestled just above South Lake, offering more stunning views and fishing spots. Today on Stoked on Fishing, we're picking up where we left off. We'll dive deeper into understanding the lakes, figuring out what the rainbow and brook trout are biting on, and trying our best to land a few. Join us as our backcountry adventure continues

programme.title: S1E1 Two Roads
programme.desc:
“Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today.
This episode features Olympic bronze medalist Kristian Ipsen, American rugby union star Carlin Isles — celebrated as “The Fastest Man in Rugby” — and his remarkable rise from track and field and American football to becoming a two-time Olympian in rugby sevens. You’ll also meet Allison Stokke, a record-breaking high school pole vaulter who went on to compete at UC Berkeley, and Miles Chamley-Watson, a British-American fencing champion whose career includes 13 team Pan American titles, a 2019 team world championship, a 2013 individual world championship, three Olympic appearances, and a 2016 team Olympic bronze medal.

programme.title: S1E2 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Trenten Merrill, an American Paralympic long jumper who claimed bronze at the 2020 Summer Paralympics. Also featured is Casey Patterson, a powerhouse in professional beach volleyball with numerous AVP tournament wins, a gold medal on the FIVB World Tour, and an appearance at the 2016 Rio Olympics alongside Jake Gibb. Tennis legends Bob and Mike Bryan, the most successful doubles team in history, take the spotlight with 16 Grand Slam titles, 119 ATP Tour doubles victories, 438 weeks as the world’s No. 1 team, and Olympic gold in 2012. Rounding out the episode is acclaimed gymnastics coach Liang Chow, celebrated for guiding Gabby Douglas to the 2012 Olympic all-around gold and coaching Shawn Johnson to multiple medals at the 2008 Olympics.

programme.title: S1E3 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Paul Rabil, legendary professional lacrosse player and co-founder of the Premier Lacrosse League, celebrated as one of the greatest in the sport’s history. Also featured is Britney Henry, a standout track and field athlete from the University of Oregon who captured the Pac-10 Conference title in the hammer throw. Rounding out the episode is Meagan Martin, trailblazing competitor as the first female rookie to complete the American Ninja Warrior course and the first-ever Women’s Champion of the series.

programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: S1 E2 Draft Story
programme.desc: A Draft Story” Part 2 is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he takes the leap into professional football. Facing unexpected challenges, honoring a promise to local kids, and navigating a situation he never imagined, Tyvis proves that the journey to the NFL is full of twists, heart, and determination.

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Minisodes - Canyoning, Jet Ski Free Ride, and Feeding Stingrays
programme.desc: The Deap Canyoning Team defies logic as they leap from high cliffs into deep canyon pools. This realatively new extreme sport called Canyoning, is breathtaking and spectacular viewing!

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they've lost, and how they've charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there's rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The first episode of The Big Reveal kicks off with a bang or rather, a jolt, as Compliant Technologies premieres their newest gadget for pioneering the safety of police officers and civilians alike. Next, Kevin Harrington meets with two individuals that Unlock Math for children around the world. Later, Sheriff Mark Lamb sits down with Bonnie from Off Duty Police Officers for a look at her streamlining systems.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The Big Reveal does it again by bringing three very different entrepreneurs together, all connected by their pioneer spirit. Flag Guard tips off this episode by explaining how they’re doing their part in keeping your loved ones safe. After that, Dr. West explains how his revolutionary probiotic will fix your digestive health 100% of the time. Host Kevin Harrington then caps off this episode in style with a trip to Tommasina Eyewear’s studio with a peak behind the curtain.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team gets back to work—this time diving into cross-marketing strategies for Advanced Vitality. Over at Hammer Haag, the team discusses launching a gritty new “Micro Dirty Jobs” miniseries to spotlight American manufacturing in action. We’re also introduced to serial entrepreneur Jeff Kline, founder of 1-800-Medigap, who brings a powerhouse presence to the team’s growing roster. Meanwhile, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s returns for a full brand overhaul with the experts. Newest A-Team member Rudy Mawer steps in with high-level influencer insight and a mission to empower the next generation of entrepreneurs. And finally, Zenith Trek makes bold moves to break into big box retail—with the A-Team guiding the way.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: In this episode of Wild Shots, Tim Harmsen heads to the heart of American gun craftsmanship with an exclusive, behind-the-scenes tour of Palmetto State Armory, where freedom is literally built on the production floor. From the anodizing line to live assembly, Tim witnesses American ingenuity in action as a rifle comes to life before his eyes. With the epic 10,000-Round Challenge complete, it’s time for some serious maintenance. The crew at SEAL 1 steps in with their cutting-edge nanotechnology to give the battle-worn BCM AK the deep clean it deserves. Once the guns are gleaming, it’s time to send rounds downrange. Teaming up with top firearms influencer Sootch, Tim takes aim at a new challenge, including a 1,000-yard Wild Shot that pushes precision, patience, and performance to the limit.

programme.title: Waterfall Relaxation - 2 Hour Nature Film with Relaxing Nature Sounds
programme.desc: Unwind with the sights and sounds of a spectacular cascading waterfall in Northern California. Burney falls is a spring fed waterfall that has been referred to as the "eighth wonder of the world". This new release also features scenes from Manzanita Lake in Lassen National Park, a scenic high alpine lake with abundant bird life. Relaxing waterfall sounds and bird songs make this a wonderful escape from the pressures of daily life.

programme.title: Preview of Point Reyes & Oregon Coast
programme.desc: This is a preview of "Point Reyes and the Oregon Coast, available to stream at www.NatureStream.tv. Enjoy over 2 hours of beautiful vistas, and explore the dramatic beauty of Point Reyes National Seashore & the stunning sea stacks of the Oregon Coast. Experience the calming effect of the seashore paired with a beautiful soundtrack.

programme.title: Preview for "Seasons of the Sierra" 3 Hour Ambient Nature Film
programme.desc: Available January 11. Experience the spectacular seasons of the Sierra Mountains in this 3 hour film. From vast swaths of colorful aspens to sparkling wildflower meadows, the "Seasons of the Sierra" showcases the stunning beauty of the Range of Light.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 206: Global Cornhole Growth, Director Insights & Tournament Faux Pas This week on Around the ACL, Jake and Meesh welcome ACL National Director Todd Kisicki to talk about the growth of cornhole around the world. Todd shares where the game is expanding internationally, what the future of global competition could look like, and how the ACL is supporting directors across the country. We also put Todd and Jake through the Cornhole Culture Test, debating what actually grows the game more—from backyard play vs organized leagues to big tournaments vs weekly leagues. To close things out, we read some Silly Tournament Faux Pas from the community before finishing with our usual Hole-y Hot Takes.

programme.title: S1E1 Two Roads
programme.desc:
“Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today.
This episode features Olympic bronze medalist Kristian Ipsen, American rugby union star Carlin Isles — celebrated as “The Fastest Man in Rugby” — and his remarkable rise from track and field and American football to becoming a two-time Olympian in rugby sevens. You’ll also meet Allison Stokke, a record-breaking high school pole vaulter who went on to compete at UC Berkeley, and Miles Chamley-Watson, a British-American fencing champion whose career includes 13 team Pan American titles, a 2019 team world championship, a 2013 individual world championship, three Olympic appearances, and a 2016 team Olympic bronze medal.

programme.title: S1E2 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Trenten Merrill, an American Paralympic long jumper who claimed bronze at the 2020 Summer Paralympics. Also featured is Casey Patterson, a powerhouse in professional beach volleyball with numerous AVP tournament wins, a gold medal on the FIVB World Tour, and an appearance at the 2016 Rio Olympics alongside Jake Gibb. Tennis legends Bob and Mike Bryan, the most successful doubles team in history, take the spotlight with 16 Grand Slam titles, 119 ATP Tour doubles victories, 438 weeks as the world’s No. 1 team, and Olympic gold in 2012. Rounding out the episode is acclaimed gymnastics coach Liang Chow, celebrated for guiding Gabby Douglas to the 2012 Olympic all-around gold and coaching Shawn Johnson to multiple medals at the 2008 Olympics.

programme.title: S1E3 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Paul Rabil, legendary professional lacrosse player and co-founder of the Premier Lacrosse League, celebrated as one of the greatest in the sport’s history. Also featured is Britney Henry, a standout track and field athlete from the University of Oregon who captured the Pac-10 Conference title in the hammer throw. Rounding out the episode is Meagan Martin, trailblazing competitor as the first female rookie to complete the American Ninja Warrior course and the first-ever Women’s Champion of the series.

programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: S1 E2 Draft Story
programme.desc: A Draft Story” Part 2 is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he takes the leap into professional football. Facing unexpected challenges, honoring a promise to local kids, and navigating a situation he never imagined, Tyvis proves that the journey to the NFL is full of twists, heart, and determination.

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing - Lexus Tahiti Pro presented by I-SEA 2025
programme.desc: More than a Championship Tour event, the Lexus Tahiti Pro presented by I-SEA will be a reckoning on the 2025 World Title race. It's the last chance for surfers looking to clinch their spot in the WSL Final 5, defend their place in the rankings, or even rewrite a season. The beauty of Teahupo'o is how it disguises its brutality. In Tahiti, it's no longer about surviving the season. It's about earning the right to fight for a World Title.

Margaret River brings raw power, pumping waves and unforgettable drama.

programme.title: Evil Stranger
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears from the streets of Southampton, England, police launch a massive manhunt. But the killer is one step ahead and flees to India, with the victim's parents hot on his heels.

programme.title: Deadly Curves
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed doctor in Florida specializes in buttock enhancements. Shockingly, this medical unprofessional injects tire-sealant, bathtub caulk and liquid cement into her patients - with homicidal consequences.

programme.title: Stranger At The Station
programme.desc: When a popular young student vanishes, her boyfriend tells police the last time he saw her was at Oxford station with a mysterious stranger by her side. The police sketch bears a remarkable resemblance to someone close to her.

programme.title: Vulture Feeder Fiend
programme.desc: During their investigation into murderer Ed Kemper, detectives become painfully aware that there is another serial killer on the loose. When police eventually zero in on their suspect, they discover a follower of the occult who believes he is sacrificing people to save humanity.

programme.title: Evil Stranger
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears from the streets of Southampton, England, police launch a massive manhunt. But the killer is one step ahead and flees to India, with the victim's parents hot on his heels.

programme.title: Deadly Curves
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed doctor in Florida specializes in buttock enhancements. Shockingly, this medical unprofessional injects tire-sealant, bathtub caulk and liquid cement into her patients - with homicidal consequences.

programme.title: Stranger At The Station
programme.desc: When a popular young student vanishes, her boyfriend tells police the last time he saw her was at Oxford station with a mysterious stranger by her side. The police sketch bears a remarkable resemblance to someone close to her.

programme.title: Vulture Feeder Fiend
programme.desc: During their investigation into murderer Ed Kemper, detectives become painfully aware that there is another serial killer on the loose. When police eventually zero in on their suspect, they discover a follower of the occult who believes he is sacrificing people to save humanity.

programme.title: Evil Stranger
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears from the streets of Southampton, England, police launch a massive manhunt. But the killer is one step ahead and flees to India, with the victim's parents hot on his heels.

programme.title: Deadly Curves
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed doctor in Florida specializes in buttock enhancements. Shockingly, this medical unprofessional injects tire-sealant, bathtub caulk and liquid cement into her patients - with homicidal consequences.

programme.title: Stranger At The Station
programme.desc: When a popular young student vanishes, her boyfriend tells police the last time he saw her was at Oxford station with a mysterious stranger by her side. The police sketch bears a remarkable resemblance to someone close to her.

programme.title: Vulture Feeder Fiend
programme.desc: During their investigation into murderer Ed Kemper, detectives become painfully aware that there is another serial killer on the loose. When police eventually zero in on their suspect, they discover a follower of the occult who believes he is sacrificing people to save humanity.
